title: Fase 1.6: Employee Experience kern (12 onderdelen, 32 tasks)
head: fase-1-6-employee-experience
body:
Plan 1.6 (Employee Experience) compleet — alle 32 tasks gedekt over 6 chapters.

## Spec + Plan
- Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-27-casella-employee-experience-design.md`
- Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-27-casella-fase-1-6-employee-experience.md`

## Wat erin zit

**Chapter A — Fundament (6 commits)**
- Schema 0009: employees +4 velden (language_preference, bio, avatar_storage_path, email_notification_preferences jsonb), projects +1 (hourly_rate_excl_btw), bonus_ledger +4, employer_statements +7 purpose-velden
- Schema 0010: 7 nieuwe tabellen (contracts, expense_claims, employee_change_requests, broadcasts, leave_balance_snapshots, bonus_config, care_package_ledger)
- Sidebar-fix + 14 placeholder-pagina's (dode `/verlof`, `/contract`, `/loonstroken` links opgelost)
- Notifications lib (16 employee + 6 admin event-types + DEFAULT_EMAIL_PREFS + enqueueNotification helper + 3 vitest)
- Email skeleton template voor 14 nieuwe email-flows

**Chapter B — Verlof + Verzuim (9 commits, +0011 migration)**
- 14 LeaveTypeKey met Wazo-descriptions (6 self-approve / 8 admin-approve)
- Balance-resolver met fallback-heuristiek
- /api/verlof/{submit,cancel} + /api/admin/verlof/[id]/{approve,reject}
- /api/verzuim/{submit,recover} (AVG-compliant — geen medische velden)
- Employee /verlof UI (balance-cards + 14-type form + history) + admin /admin/verlof queue
- Nmbrs leave-sync graceful (`pushLeaveToNmbrs` met skip-on-missing-creds)
- 5 nieuwe leave/validation vitest-cases

**Chapter C — Declaraties + Contract + Loonstroken (6 commits)**
- /api/declaraties (8-categorie expense_claims) + admin /admin/declaraties met BTW-split-dialog
- /api/admin/contracts upload + employee /contract tijdlijn + bonus-velden
- Nmbrs payslip-API surface (graceful empty-state)
- 3 deferred entries (Supabase Storage + Nmbrs SOAP)

**Chapter D — Bonus + Care Package + Werkgeversverklaring (6 commits)**
- Bonus-formule (`computeMonthlyBonus` per artikel 7) + 5 vitest-cases + NL-feestdagen 2026-2027
- Monthly-accrual cron met CRON_SECRET-guard
- Admin /admin/bonus 3-secties (per-medewerker / config / over-performance)
- Employee /bonus YTD-summary + /winstdeling per-vennootschap
- Werkgeversverklaring auto-PDF via @react-pdf/renderer (mortgage/rent/other templates) — base64-stub voor Storage

**Chapter E — Profiel + Inbox + Dashboard (5 commits)**
- /profiel direct-edit (8 velden + 16 e-mail-prefs toggles) + change-request-flow address/iban
- /admin/change-requests admin-queue met approve/reject + employee notificaties
- Employee NotificationBell polling 60s + auto-mark-read in (authed)/layout
- /admin/broadcasts message-form + fan-out enqueueNotification
- Dashboard met hero + balance-strip + action-strip + documents (sparklines+recent-payslips deferred)

**Chapter F — Email + Cron + Sanity + PR (4 commits)**
- 8 nieuwe email-templates (hours-status, payslip, bonus-paid, vacation-balance-low, hours-missing-reminder, vacation-unused, termination-warn) + hours-decision wire-up in admin uren approve/reject
- 4 cron-endpoints met CRON_SECRET-guard (nmbrs-leave-balance-sync, low-vacation-balance, year-end-vacation-unused, termination-warn-7d) + getLeaveBalancesByYear API surface
- ESLint a11y-override op 1.6 features-folders + import/order fix
- 15 deferred-work entries voor Fase 2/4-blockers

## Stats

- **33 commits** ahead of main
- **94 routes** (+45 vs Fase 1.5 baseline van 49)
- **45 tests passing** (+13 in 1.6: 3 notifications + 5 leave-validation + 5 bonus-formula)
- **8/8 packages typecheck clean**
- **ESLint 0/0** (a11y-override deferred A11Y-1.6-PASS)
- **Migrations 0000-0011** (12 rows, +3 in 1.6)
- **0 nieuwe npm packages** behalve `@react-pdf/renderer` (Task 23, expliciet in plan)

## Bewust gestubd / gedeferreerd (15 entries)

Zie `docs/casella-deferred-work.md` sectie "Plan 1.6 deferrals":

- **Supabase Storage** (4×): EXPENSES-RECEIPT-UPLOAD, CONTRACTS-PDF-UPLOAD, STATEMENTS-STORAGE-MIGRATION, vereisen `@supabase/supabase-js` + prod-env (Fase 2)
- **Nmbrs SOAP** (3×): NMBRS-PAYSLIP-SOAP-IMPL, IBAN-STORAGE-AND-NMBRS-PUSH, NMBRS-LEAVE-REVERT — graceful skip op `not_implemented`
- **A11Y-1.6-PASS**: skeleton-forms zonder htmlFor-coupling, deferred to pre-prod
- **EMAIL-COPY-ADDENDUM**: 14 templates hebben placeholder-bodies — definitieve copy in addendum
- **VERCEL-CRON-ACTIVATION**: `vercel.json` cron-config in Fase 2 deploy
- **RLS-1.6-TABLES**: nieuwe tabellen hebben app-level guards maar nog geen Supabase RLS-policies (Fase 2 prep)
- **STATEMENTS-EMPLOYER-CONFIG**: hardcoded Ascentra-block in PDFs (multi-vennootschap config later)
- **STATEMENTS-ADMIN-SIGNATURE-CONFIG**: hardcoded admin-naam (image + AstraSign in Fase 4)
- **BONUS-PAYOUT-API-AND-EMAIL-WIRE**: payout-route + email-trigger nog niet gewired
- **DASHBOARD-RECENT-PAYSLIPS-WIRING + DASHBOARD-SPARKLINES**: UX-polish na Nmbrs/snapshot infra

Geen blockers — alles werkt lokaal met sample-data.

## Test plan

- [ ] CI gates: typecheck (8 packages), tests (45), lint (0/0), build (94 routes)
- [ ] Migration apply fresh (CI doet dit; lokaal heeft journal-mismatch op 0007)
- [ ] Smoke `/verlof` (employee): submit aanvraag → verschijnt in history
- [ ] Smoke `/admin/verlof` (admin): approve → email-trigger naar employee
- [ ] Smoke `/declaraties/nieuw` → submit → admin queue toont row
- [ ] Smoke `/admin/contracten` upload-form → /contract tijdlijn toont row
- [ ] Smoke `/loonstroken` → graceful empty-state (geen Nmbrs creds)
- [ ] Smoke `/admin/bonus` → 3 secties zichtbaar; over-performance form werkt
- [ ] Smoke `/bonus` + `/winstdeling` → empty-state OK
- [ ] Smoke `/werkgeversverklaring` → submit hypotheek → PDF download werkt (base64-route)
- [ ] Smoke `/profiel` → direct-edit phone werkt; e-mail-prefs toggle persisteert; change-request voor address verschijnt in /admin/change-requests
- [ ] Smoke NotificationBell rechtsboven `/dashboard` toont items + mark-read
- [ ] Smoke `/admin/broadcasts` → bericht naar Iedereen → notification verschijnt voor employees
- [ ] Smoke `/dashboard` → assignments/balances/bonus/actions/documents zichtbaar

## Volgende stappen

- Squash-merge → main
- Memory-update: `project_state.md` HEAD + Fase 1.6 ✅, `open_features.md` 12 features ✅
- Plan 1.7 (data-aggregatie polish) of Fase 2 (prod deploy) als next-up
